title: Define runtime automation contract
goal: Document the Bureau control-tower automation model, including source authority, status vocabulary, event semantics and forbidden implicit powers.

metadata.safety_boundary: documentation and contract only; no runtime authority change

acceptance.assertion: Documentation separates registry authority, runtime state, observer evidence, status projection and dispatcher authority.
A shared vocabulary exists for assigned, running, dispatching, PR observed, CI unknown, review blocked, merged, verified and stale states.
The contract explicitly forbids automatic merge, cleanup and completion authority in this baseline.
